description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized human figure standing upright on a rectangular plinth, holding a large, abstract, oval-shaped object under one arm. The figure is rendered in a patinated greenish-blue metal, giving it a weathered, oxidized appearance. The body is elongated and simplified, with minimal facial features and a smooth, muscular form. The base is metallic and shows signs of rust and weathering, suggesting long-term outdoor exposure. The oval object, possibly representing a shield or abstract form, is held close to the torso, with the figure's arms wrapped around it. The overall impression is one of strength and contemplation, with a modernist aesthetic.
description: A stylized human figure in greenish-blue metal stands on a weathered plinth, holding a large oval object under one arm. The sculpture has a modern, abstract design with a patinated finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the figure's face, chest, and the oval object held under the left arm, with both feet visible on the plinth.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full profile of the oval object and the figure's arm wrapped around it.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the figure and the oval object, with the plinth's rust and weathering more visible.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the figure's back and the oval object's width, as well as the muscular contours of the figure.
attribute_subject_matter: stylized human figure holding an abstract oval object
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is mounted on a weathered plinth, suggesting an outdoor urban or park setting.
